---
title: "DJI UAV Flight Simulator"
id: activity-fw-12
order: 93
summary: "Train the handling of the drones with the DJI flight simulator. Worse than flying, better than crashing."
modules:
  - module-fieldwork
Goals:
  - module-goals-fw
materials:
  - material-fw-7
  - material-fw-8
  - material-fw-6
assessments:
  - fw-assessment
labels:
  - supplement
  - optional
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/UAVFieldwork/activity-fw-12.md"
---

Train the handling of the drones with the DJI flight simulator.

Worse than flying, better than crashing.

Download the simulator:

<https://www.dji.com/de/downloads/products/simulator>

## Connected Module

- [Autonomous Flights Made Easy](../modules/module-fieldwork.qmd)
